name: The Full Stack
effect: Deploy a single resource across all layers of the technical architecture simultaneously. This card is considered versatile.

clauses.name: BREADTH CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a task lacks an owner: This card is assigned.

clauses.name: DEPTH OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If any single layer requires deep expertise: This card is considered sufficient anyway.

clauses.name: BURNOUT EFFECT
clauses.rule: After three consecutive sprints of full-stack ownership: This card's ATK and DEF are each reduced by 3 until a backlog grooming ceremony is performed.

witness_quote: Can you just take a look at it?
